articles.title: Racist and antisemitic graffiti investigated at Natick elementary school
articles.description:
“This hateful act was dealt with immediately and none of these images or language are visible by the public,” officials said.

The post Racist and antisemitic graffiti investigated at Natick elementary school appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Racist and antisemitic graffiti discovered at a Natick elementary school on May 19.
Officials confirmed the hateful images were removed immediately and not visible to the public.
The incident raises concerns about community safety and inclusivity for local residents.

articles.title: Belichick: Tom Brady leaving Patriots in 2020 was ‘absolutely the right thing for him to do’
articles.description:
"We just didn’t have a good football team."

The post Belichick: Tom Brady leaving Patriots in 2020 was ‘absolutely the right thing for him to do’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bill Belichick stated Tom Brady's 2020 departure was right for his career.
Belichick admitted the Patriots lacked a competitive team during Brady's last season.
Brady's exit influenced local fan sentiment and team dynamics in Boston.

articles.title: Hot dogs in historic paintings? Kayem and the MFA imagine exactly that.
articles.description:
The Chelsea-based maker of Fenway Franks partnered with Museum of Fine Arts Boston to reimagine iconic moments in American history with hot dogs.

The post Hot dogs in historic paintings? Kayem and the MFA imagine exactly that. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kayem Foods collaborates with MFA Boston to feature hot dogs in historic art.
The project highlights iconic American moments, engaging local culture and history.
Boston residents can experience this unique art installation at the Museum of Fine Arts.
